title: SWD Cricket’s local leagues competition kicks off
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRICKET NEWS - SWD Cricket’s 2025/26 local leagues competition will kick off with the T20 knock-out competition on Saturday, 13 September.","html":"CRICKET NEWS - SWD Cricket’s 2025/26 local leagues competition will kick off with the T20 knock-out competition on Saturday, 13 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The pool matches will be contested for the next two weekends, whereafter the respective pool winners will advance to the quarter-finals on 27 September.","html":"The pool matches will be contested for the next two weekends, whereafter the respective pool winners will advance to the quarter-finals on 27 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The semi-finals will be played on 4 October, and the final is scheduled to be played at the Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn, also on 4 October.","html":"The semi-finals will be played on 4 October, and the final is scheduled to be played at the Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn, also on 4 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United won the title for the past two seasons.","html":"Pacaltsdorp United won the title for the past two seasons."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The fixtures for the weekend are as follows (host venue in brackets):","html":"The fixtures for the weekend are as follows (host venue in brackets):"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Saturday 13 September• Pool A:Mossel Bay CC vs Dysselsdorp CC; Union Stars I vs Calitzdorp Young Stars CC; Calitzdorp Young Stars CC vs Mossel Bay CC (Van Riebeeck B Field)","html":"Saturday 13 September
• Pool A:
Mossel Bay CC vs Dysselsdorp CC; Union Stars I vs Calitzdorp Young Stars CC; Calitzdorp Young Stars CC vs Mossel Bay CC (Van Riebeeck B Field)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Pool C:NMU CC vs Harlequins Forces CC; Beaufort West CC vs Harlequins Forces CC; Masakhane CC vs NMU CC (NMU Saasveld Campus)","html":"• Pool C:
NMU CC vs Harlequins Forces CC; Beaufort West CC vs Harlequins Forces CC; Masakhane CC vs NMU CC (NMU Saasveld Campus)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Pool D:Pacaltsdorp United CC vs KwaNonqaba; Blanco CC vs Pacaltsdorp United CC; New Dawn Park CC vs Blanco CC (Pacaltsdorp United Oval Sportsground)","html":"• Pool D:
Pacaltsdorp United CC vs KwaNonqaba; Blanco CC vs Pacaltsdorp United CC; New Dawn Park CC vs Blanco CC (Pacaltsdorp United Oval Sportsground)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Pool E:George CC vs SWD U19 Squad; Ramblers CC vs SWD U19 Squad; SWD U19 Squad vs Mayflower (Rooiriverrif Sportsground)","html":"• Pool E:
George CC vs SWD U19 Squad; Ramblers CC vs SWD U19 Squad; SWD U19 Squad vs Mayflower (Rooiriverrif Sportsground)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Pool F:Riversdale CC vs Heidelberg United CC; Riversdale CC vs Plett Pioneers CC; Heidelberg United CC vs Headliners CC (Riverville Sportsground)","html":"• Pool F:
Riversdale CC vs Heidelberg United CC; Riversdale CC vs Plett Pioneers CC; Heidelberg United CC vs Headliners CC (Riverville Sportsground)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Pool G:Pirates United CC vs Union Stars II; Western Hope CC vs Bongolethu CC; Bongolethu CC vs Pirates United CC (Loerie Park in Knysna)","html":"• Pool G:
Pirates United CC vs Union Stars II; Western Hope CC vs Bongolethu CC; Bongolethu CC vs Pirates United CC (Loerie Park in Knysna)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Pool H:Melkhoutfontein CC vs Albertinia CC; Ladismith CC vs Melkhoutfotein CC; Albertinia CC vs Sussex CC (Albertinia Sportsground)Sunday 14 September• Pool B:Thembalethu CC vs Knysna Cavaliers CC; Hartenbos CC vs Knysna Cavaliers CC; Kranshoek Cobras CC vs Thembalethu CC (Pacaltsdorp Oval Sportsground)","html":"• Pool H:
Melkhoutfontein CC vs Albertinia CC; Ladismith CC vs Melkhoutfotein CC; Albertinia CC vs Sussex CC (Albertinia Sportsground)

Sunday 14 September
• Pool B:
Thembalethu CC vs Knysna Cavaliers CC; Hartenbos CC vs Knysna Cavaliers CC; Kranshoek Cobras CC vs Thembalethu CC (Pacaltsdorp Oval Sportsground)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
